primary_operations.name: save
primary_operations.sdk_call: this.jdbcTemplate.update("INSERT INTO t(id,payload) VALUES (?,?) ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET payload = ?", id, payload, payload);

primary_operations.name: findById
primary_operations.sdk_call: return this.jdbcTemplate.queryForObject("SELECT payload FROM t WHERE id = ?", byte[].class, id);

primary_operations.name: deleteById
primary_operations.sdk_call: this.jdbcTemplate.update("DELETE FROM t WHERE id = ?", id);

code_style_notes: Spring Boot auto-configures JdbcTemplate from spring.datasource.* properties.
JdbcTemplate is thread-safe; share one instance via @Bean.
Use positional ? parameter substitution to avoid SQL injection.
